summary.key_theme: Coinbase 積極拓展 AI 支付基礎設施與非美地區衍生品業務，儘管面臨估值過高與市場競爭壓力，整體成長動能仍受分析師看好。

bullish.title: Baird Raises PT on Coinbase Global (COIN) to $215 Amid Crypto Price Appreciation
bullish.reason: Baird 調升目標價至 215 美元，反映出市場對其區塊鏈基礎設施業務在加密貨幣價格回升環境下的獲利預期。

bullish.title: Coinbase Launches 24/7 Stock Trading For Tesla, Apple, Nvidia With 10X Leverage
bullish.reason: 推出針對非美用戶的 24/7 股票永續期貨合約，展現其向「萬物交易所」轉型的策略，有助於提升交易量與手續費收入。

bullish.title: Coinbase Global Inc (COIN)’s Stablecoin Revenue Could Grow Sevenfold
bullish.reason: 分析師預測其穩定幣相關營收有七倍成長空間，顯示其在支付基礎設施領域的潛在獲利能力。

bullish.title: Market Chatter: Coinbase Builds AI Agent Payments Infrastructure, Targets Cloudflare Deal
bullish.reason: 透過 AgentKit 布局 AI 代理支付基礎設施，並與 Cloudflare 等企業洽談合作，開拓新的 B2B 支付市場。

bullish.title: Coinbase to Boost Global Expansion With Bybit Partnership?
bullish.reason: 傳出與 Bybit 洽談 250 億美元規模的合作，若成真將顯著提升其全球衍生品市場的市佔率。

bullish.title: Coinbase Stock Retakes Key Level As Bitcoin Rebounds
bullish.reason: 股價重回 50 日移動平均線，顯示技術面轉強，且與比特幣價格走勢高度正相關。

bullish.title: Is Aon’s Stablecoin Premium Deal Quietly Reframing Coinbase’s Role in Real-World Payments Infrastructure
bullish.reason: 透過 Aon 的保險支付案例，驗證了 Coinbase 在現實世界支付基礎設施中的實用價值。

bullish.title: Coinbase (COIN) Expands Toward ‘Everything Exchange’ Vision
bullish.reason: 長期成長願景明確，被分析師列為值得長期持有的成長型股票之一。

bearish.title: New Strong Sell Stocks for March 17th — AVTR, COIN and CMG have been added to the Zacks Rank #5 (Strong Sell) List
bearish.reason: Zacks 將其列入「強烈賣出」名單，反映出短期財務動能或估值指標在量化模型中表現不佳。

bearish.title: Is Coinbase Global (COIN) Overvalued After Cybersecurity Jitters And Recent Share Price Moves
bearish.reason: 市場對資安疑慮與近期股價漲幅過快表示擔憂，引發對估值是否過高的討論。

bearish.title: COIN vs. GOLD: Which Alternative-Asset Platform is the Better Buy?
bearish.reason: 與黃金等避險資產比較，指出加密貨幣相關風險較高，可能導致部分保守資金流出。

bearish.title: Coinbase’s AgentKit Targets AI Transactions While Valuation Stays Stretched
bearish.reason: 儘管產品創新，但市場仍持續關注其高昂的本益比與估值壓力。

bearish.title: Coinbase Global, Inc. (COIN) Declines More Than Market
bearish.reason: 股價單日下跌 2.67%，表現弱於大盤，顯示短期獲利了結賣壓。

neutral.title: Streamex Appoints Ex-Coinbase Exec as CFO
neutral.reason: 前高管離職轉任他職，對 Coinbase 本身營運影響有限，屬中性人事消息。

neutral.title: Financial Technology Stocks Q4 In Review: Coinbase (NASDAQ:COIN) Vs Peers
neutral.reason: 僅為季度財報回顧與同業比較，未提供新的重大財務指引。

neutral.title: Is Coinbase (COIN) Still The Best Crypto Stock To Buy and Hold?
neutral.reason: 討論 Cathie Wood 的持股調整，屬於市場觀點分析，對股價無直接驅動影響。

neutral.title: Stocks making big moves yesterday: El Pollo Loco, Stryker, Dollar Tree, Coinbase, and Distribution Solutions
neutral.reason: 僅為盤後市場波動總結，未涉及公司基本面變化。

neutral.title: Coinbase (COIN) Stock Is Up, What You Need To Know
neutral.reason: 解釋股價上漲原因為市場情緒改善，屬於事後分析。
